historical_parallel: The Babylonian Conquest of Judah (586 AD)
era_resolution: Military conquest and exile of the Jewish population
modern_resolution: Employing advanced diplomatic AI and predictive analytics for conflict mediation and prevention

biblical_tie.context: They will beat their swords into plowshares and their spears into pruning hooks. Nation will not take up sword against nation, nor will they train for war anymore.

protocol: Implementing UESP-mediated dialogue sessions between key international stakeholders to facilitate a peaceful resolution, leveraging machine learning models to forecast and mitigate potential flashpoints
